question: What is the date of all orders that have been placed by customers with at least 2 payment methods?
sql: SELECT date_order_placed FROM Orders WHERE customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Payment_Methods GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(payment_method_code) >= 2)

back_translation.intent: 获取具有多个支付方式的客户的订单日期
filters: customer_id IN (SELECT customer_id FROM Customer_Payment_Methods GROUP BY customer_id HAVING COUNT(payment_method_code) >= 2)

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求获取具有至少2种支付方式的客户的订单日期，SQL描述通过子查询筛选出符合条件的customer_id，并从Orders表中提取对应的date_order_placed列，符合业务逻辑。过滤条件正确，无需额外分组或聚合，且未要求排序和限制结果数量。
